summary: Tested Blueprint-Driven Upload feature for Prashnakosh V1. All 10 backend tests pass (100%). All 12 frontend tests pass (100%). Coverage endpoint returns section-wise stats with required/approved/pending/coveragePercent. Section lock validation correctly reassigns questions from wrong sections with warnings. Lesson breakdown shows Life Processes (3Q) and Motion (2Q) as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/blueprints/:id/coverage correctly returns section-wise coverage with required/approved/pending/coveragePercent
Coverage endpoint includes lessonBreakdown with topics and their approved/pending counts
Section lock validation (targetSection parameter) correctly reassigns questions from other sections with warnings
POST confirm endpoint saves questions with correct section/lesson/topic/departmentId
Blueprint Upload Dashboard shows 3 section cards (A, B, C) with stats
Upload button navigates to /teacher/upload/word with blueprintId and targetSection URL params
Word upload page shows 'Upload Section A Questions' title and blue section lock banner
Teacher dashboard has 'Blueprint Upload' card with 'Open Blueprint Upload' button
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data. Blueprint 'IX Science Half Yearly 2026' (ID: 9da18a60-202b-4d11-90d2-c634100cd7a0) with 3 sections (A, B, C). 7 questions in Section A (pending_approval status).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blueprint-Driven Upload feature is fully functional. Coverage endpoint returns section-wise stats with lessonBreakdown. Section A has 7 pending questions with lessons: Life Processes (3Q: Nutrition 2, Respiration 1), Motion (2Q: Velocity 2), Test Confirm Lesson (2Q). Section lock validation works - questions from other sections are reassigned to target section with warnings. Blueprint Upload Dashboard at /teacher/upload/blueprint shows section cards with Required/Approved/Pending/Coverage stats. Upload button navigates to /teacher/upload/word?blueprintId=...&targetSection=A. Word upload page shows section lock banner.
